chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1594 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner, submits that as per latter’s instructions, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
